title: Survival Magnet's
description: Add two new magnets to the game.
body:
# Magnetic Tools Datapack

This datapack is **based on the excellent work** by [webdiamond](https://modrinth.com/user/webdiamond), original [Magnet](https://modrinth.com/datapack/magnet_magnet) datapack.  
I'm very thankful for their inspiration — and if you're looking for a **simpler version with easier crafting**, I definitely recommend checking it out!

---

This version introduces **two custom magnetic tools** designed for more balanced, survival-friendly gameplay.  
They help you easily gather nearby dropped items with just a simple offhanding.

## Features

- **Basic Magnet**  
  Pulls all nearby dropped items within a **6-block radius** (12×12 area).  
  Simple and useful for quick cleanups while mining or farming.

- **Advanced Magnet**  
  An upgraded version with an impressive **32-block radius** (64×64 area).  
  Perfect for farms or large-scale collection.

Both magnets are crafted with valuable materials to reflect their usefulness and power. Crafting recipes are included in the datapack and designed to maintain balance.

## Screenshots

Magnets use lantern models to blend naturally with the vanilla aesthetic. If you use a **3D lantern resource pack**, the visual effect is even better! *(See screenshots in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/survival-magnets/gallery).)*

## Future Plans

- **Custom resource pack**: I'm working on unique models for the magnets, but they already look great as lanterns for now.
- **Balancing improvements**: I want to add conditions or limitations to magnets, such as:
  - Durability or cooldowns  
  - Custom attributes  
  - Potential drawbacks or side effects

---

Let me know what you think, and feel free to suggest ideas!  
Hope you enjoy using magnets as much as I enjoyed creating them.
